results.title: Hevy Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
Customization

Report

 146 views

•2 reviews

I have been using this app for almost two years and it's pretty great. It's useful for tracking my weights and for creating new exercises with compound movements that are not in the normal library. It's incredibly easy to use (compared to the GS app and other alternatives) and it's easy to edit or add sets/exercises, etc. mid workout. I don't use the friend function much, but that does work well for those who want that interactivity.

#### What's great

easy to use (20)tracking features (21)customizable workouts (5)

Report

 88 views

•1 review [...] Report

 88 views

•1 review

Can't start a workout without Hevy. Great app! I wish I made it! The interface is clean and easy to navigate, and I love how customizable it is. The tracking of weights can be a bit confusing at times, but it’s a minor issue compared to everything the app gets right.

#### What's great

easy to use (20)customizable workouts (5)

#### What needs improvement

confusing weight tracking (1)

Report

 65 views

•1 review [...] Based on 65 reviews

Review Hevy?

Reviewers largely see Hevy as a clean, simple workout tracker that is fast to use between sets and strong on the basics: logging sets, reps, weights, volume, routines, and progress over time. Many also praise its graphs, analytics, customization, and social features, saying the community helps with motivation and accountability. Criticism is limited but consistent: some want a better UI, clearer weight tracking, more advanced programs, stronger notifications and motivation tools, a calendar view, and easier sharing or friend discovery.

Storyworth

Storyworth

I'm sorry to hear about your experience and for the delay in reaching out to you here. The shipping methods are based on the weight of the books so it's possible that the weight was greater than the amount allowed for economy shipping. In any case, I'll reach out to you by email to see if we can help make up for your troubles. -Sarah

Report

•1 review [...] Report

•1 review

I have just received my book. I thoroughly enjoyed putting some of my memories in print. I'm thinking about writing volume 2 as there is so much left out. The second book will be more chronologically placed. It really is a must to put down your memories for your children and grandchildren. Loved every word of volume 1.

This program is trash and your customer service is worse. You respond to emails for help with redundant answers. I bought two books for my parents last year and they have not been able to submit any stories. They wrote it all out… pressed save and it deletes everything they wrote. You provide a customer service is number no one answers. DO NOT waste your money.
